sentences.translation: Hind je zaboravila svoju knjigu kod kuće.
sentences.translationEn: Hind forgot her book at home.

sentences.translation: Prijateljica je dijelila s njom knjigu tokom cijelog časa.
sentences.translationEn: Her friend shared the book with her throughout the lesson.

sentences.translation: Hind je rekla prijateljici hvala lijepa.
sentences.translationEn: Hind said to her friend many thanks.

sentences.arabic: قَالَتِ الصَّدِيقَةُ: لَا شُكْرَ عَلَى وَاجِبٍ.
sentences.translation: Prijateljica je rekla: Nema na čemu.
sentences.translationEn: The friend said: Don't mention it.

sentences.arabic: فِي اليَوْمِ التَّالِي لَمْ تَنْسَ هِنْدٌ كِتَابَهَا أَبَدًا.
sentences.translation: Sljedećeg dana Hind nikad više nije zaboravila knjigu.
sentences.translationEn: The next day Hind never forgot her book again.
